headline: E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley Releases Monthly Sector Rotation Study
summary: NEW YORK, March 02, 2026--E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley today released the data from its monthly sector rotation study, which indicates whether clients were net buyers or sellers in each of the 11 core stock market sectors defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). These figures, which encompass activity in all US-traded stocks (including OTC) and ADRs, reflect purchases and sales of the individual stocks in each sector, as well as dividend investments and options exercises and

headline: Morgan Stanley brings trust charter pursuit into the mainstream
summary: The banking behemoth’s application lands at the OCC as a flurry of fintechs vie for the same license. Morgan Stanley has recently partnered on a crypto trading effort and filed paperwork for holdings of three digital currencies.
